---
title: use-any
description: "Prefer any to interface{}."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Prefer any to interface{}. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
var value interface{}
```

## Good

```go
var value any
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only use-any`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
